positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial journey: a group of three gentle, whimsical flying creatures (like stylized hummingbirds or small fantasy beasts) carrying glowing lanterns, flying through a gradient nebula sky. The composition is highly symmetrical, centered on the main flight path. Use deep indigo, electric cyan, and gold accents for strong contrast. The aesthetic should be 'Art Nouveau Meets Low-Poly Minimalism,' emphasizing clean, thick outlines and solid color blocks. Style must be vector art and graphic illustration, perfect for screen printing. High contrast, silhouette focus, crisp details, ethereal glow emanating from the lanterns, central composition, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifact, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry lines, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grunge, photorealistic, complex background clutter
